title: 2026 03 06 Emily Visit Itinerary
html:
TL;DR

  • The March 13–25 Austin visit itinerary for Emily Stevens — Eugene → Seattle → Austin arrival 11:59pm Friday, departure 5:45pm Wednesday the 25th, ~12 days together.
  • Yahir explicitly notes "need to be sustainable... need to be nice and natural existence" — a guard-rail against the burnout pattern visible in the Feb 3 trip prep letter.
  • Frames a planned 3-day Texas/Mexico road-trip but flags Mexican cartel activity making the border "scary" — softens the Brownsville/La Pesca plan from Feb 3.
  • Loaded with Austin sidequests: SXSW (timing-coincident), Wednesday show at Emo's, 10-mile river loop, gong-fu Chinese tea house, Enchanted Rock, Hyde Park (Elizabeth Ney Museum, first light books, WeLiveVide0), Casa De Luz, Driftwood drive-in.
  • Activity menu split between physical (yoga, pilates, gym, long walks, stretching, "wrestling," picklebsll) and food/place sweep — the same Austin geographic catalog later re-pasted as the Austin Sidequests List.

Core content

The itinerary uses a 7-column day grid with Yahir's work shifts (10pm starts on certain days) marked alongside Emily's free days. The doc is half-planned, half-aspirational — most middle days have empty cells. The visit overlaps SXSW, gives them the Austin sushi surface area, and includes Yahir's quiet practice of asking Emily to commit to specifics: "figure out when and where we're going on a beach trip", "decide when we're doing our 10-mile river walk". The recurring question — when is Emily's meeting with the lab researcher? — implies Emily had a parallel academic/professional thread running in Austin.

The Tab 1 emotional preamble carries a mid-arc sentence: "Many hugs, kisses, cuddles, sex" — the visit is also a re-anchoring effort after the Feb 3 letter and the implicit "prompting fatigue" it named.

The "thing in notes I've accumulated" section reproduces ~80 Austin places — gives the vault a near-complete catalog of Yahir's mid-2026 Austin geographic mind-map. Notable adds vs. earlier lists: Equipment Room Bar, Tiger Lilly (Friday Jazz and Half of Martinis), Lucy's (fried chicken), Gourdough (donuts), Bird Bird Biscuit, Moonshine, Cosmic Cafe.

Open questions

  • Did the trip ever become a road trip, or did it stay Austin-only?
  • Was the Wednesday Emo's show attended? (Concert specificity suggests yes)
  • Which place from this catalog became repeat-visit vs. one-time?

Privacy

  • No credentials, phone numbers. Emily's identity already in vault.

Connections

  • the emily arc · emily stevens
